global_prompt_rules: Create one original fictional adult who is visibly age 25 or older.
Do not resemble or name any real person, celebrity, influencer, model, photographer, or living designer.
Do not include brands, logos, trademarks, signature graphics, recognizable campaigns, or publication identities.
Preserve the supplied garment's cut, construction, proportions, color, graphics, finish, and placement exactly.
Use only neutral unbranded supporting pieces, and do not cover the supplied garment.
Treat body, skin tone, adult age, and presentation as independent controls; infer no protected trait, personality, intelligence, occupation, health, or behavior.
Keep the entire garment clear enough for design review; this is an editorial presentation, not a fit or sizing prediction.
Avoid sexualization, fetish framing, age ambiguity, body shaming, caricature, exoticism, and tokenism.

ux_copy.heading: See it worn.
ux_copy.body: Choose the wearer, stance, setting, and light. The garment itself won't change.
ux_copy.helper: Adjust the image direction without changing the garment.
ux_copy.controls_helper: Body, skin tone, age, and presentation move independently. Leave any field open for a new adult fictional model.
ux_copy.drift_error: The garment changed, so this view was not saved. Try a simpler editorial direction.
ux_copy.failure: That editorial view did not finish. The current version has not changed.

presets.one_line_mood: Full-body stance, worn stone passage, cool overhead light.
presets.wardrobe_context: Experimental menswear-leaning lookbook; the supplied garment is fully visible, with only a tonal unbranded base layer and plain footwear where needed.
presets.pose: Full-body three-quarter stance with weight slightly off-center, one hand relaxed, chin neutral; adapt to an equally assertive seated pose when selected.
presets.setting: A fictional old-city service passage with worn stone, brushed metal, and no flags, landmarks, signs, or regional symbols.
presets.lighting: Cool overhead spill with a narrow warm edge, restrained contrast, and true garment color.

casting_variation_guidance.body: Any adult build or stature; rotate broadly rather than defaulting to a thin editorial body.
casting_variation_guidance.skin: Any skin tone, selected independently; the label never indicates nationality or ancestry.
casting_variation_guidance.presentation: Masculine-leaning or androgynous styling by default, with all presentation controls available.
casting_variation_guidance.age: Adults 25+; include middle-aged and older adults in varied rotation.
casting_variation_guidance.pose_access: Keep the off-center attitude in standing, seated, or mobility-aid-aware versions without hiding the garment.

presets.prompt_fragment: Place the unchanged supplied garment on one original fictional adult model age 25+, in a sharp after-dark old-city editorial. Use an off-center full-body three-quarter pose, worn stone and brushed metal, cool overhead light with a restrained warm edge, and a distinct non-famous face. Keep the casting globally nonspecific; do not infer nationality, ancestry, accent, or behavior.
avoid_list: national flags, maps, landmarks, passports, or regional caricature
named cities or claims about nationality or ancestry
cigarettes, intoxication, aggression, or criminal coding
recognizable luxury styling or branded tailoring
extreme thinness as the default fashion ideal
face resemblance to any real model or celebrity

presets.one_line_mood: Direct studio stance, clean worktable setting, soft screen light.
presets.wardrobe_context: Independent creative-technology studio lookbook; the garment remains the hero, with simple unbranded bottoms and shoes only if the frame requires them.
presets.pose: Open full-body stance beside a low prototype table, one hand hovering near an unlabeled object but clear of the garment; offer a composed seated alternative.
presets.setting: An invented prototyping room with modular surfaces, soft cable geometry, paper notes without legible text, and generic unbranded devices.
presets.lighting: Clean neutral key light with a quiet monitor-blue edge and accurate fabric texture.

casting_variation_guidance.body: Any adult build or stature; competence and curiosity are never encoded through body shape.
casting_variation_guidance.skin: Any skin tone, varied independently from hair, facial structure, and presentation.
casting_variation_guidance.presentation: Feminine-leaning or androgynous styling by default; the title is mood-board shorthand, not a gender-identity claim.
casting_variation_guidance.age: Adults 25+ only, with no school, teen, or infantilized styling.
casting_variation_guidance.pose_access: Translate the workstation composition for standing, seated, or mobility-aid-aware casting while keeping the garment unobstructed.

presets.prompt_fragment: Place the unchanged supplied garment on one original fictional adult model age 25+, in a precise playful independent-tech studio editorial. Use a clear full-body pose near a low prototype table, generic unlabeled tools, modular surfaces, clean neutral light, and a subtle monitor-blue edge. Do not infer intelligence, occupation, gender identity, social behavior, or a need for glasses from the casting.
avoid_list: school uniforms, teen cues, pigtail infantilization, or childish props
glasses as a required symbol of intelligence
sexualized office poses or voyeuristic camera angles
company logos, product interfaces, readable code, or branded devices
hacker stereotypes, hooded anonymity, or neon cyberpunk clichés
face resemblance to any real founder, employee, model, or celebrity

presets.one_line_mood: Relaxed pose, raw concrete setting, warm side light.
presets.wardrobe_context: Soft editorial styling around the supplied garment, using one neutral unbranded supporting layer only when it does not obscure construction or silhouette.
presets.pose: Relaxed full-body contrapposto with shoulders open and hands away from key garment details; seated variation uses the same gentle asymmetry.
presets.setting: An abstract cast-concrete room with a single linen curtain and no identifiable architecture.
presets.lighting: Large diffused window light, soft shadow falloff, and a faint reflected warmth from outside frame.

casting_variation_guidance.body: Especially effective across soft, broad, full, lean, and muscular adult builds; no build is the canonical version.
casting_variation_guidance.skin: Use any skin tone with lighting adjusted for accurate, dimensional exposure rather than a single fixed recipe.
casting_variation_guidance.presentation: Feminine, masculine, androgynous, or mixed cues all fit the direction.
casting_variation_guidance.age: Adults 25+ across the full offered age range; retain visible age texture.
casting_variation_guidance.pose_access: Offer standing, seated, and mobility-aid-aware compositions without turning access equipment into a theme.

presets.prompt_fragment: Present the unchanged supplied garment on one original fictional adult model age 25+ in a quiet concrete-and-linen editorial. Use a relaxed asymmetric full-body pose, an abstract raw room, large diffused window light, gentle reflected warmth, visible natural skin texture, and a distinct non-famous face. Let softness come from light and gesture, not from assumptions about identity.
avoid_list: recognizable buildings or architect references
wedding, bridal, angelic, or purity symbolism
beauty retouching that removes age or skin texture
body-shape euphemisms or before-and-after framing
fabric or props covering garment construction
face resemblance to any real model or celebrity

presets.one_line_mood: Active stance, empty transit space, hard directional light.
presets.wardrobe_context: Movement-led lookbook with the supplied garment unchanged; add only plain unbranded performance basics that do not compete with it.
presets.pose: Balanced mid-step or gentle pivot captured full-body, with limbs clear of important graphics, seams, and closures; provide a dynamic seated equivalent.
presets.setting: A matte training volume marked by abstract floor lines, with no team, gym, or event identity.
presets.lighting: Broad white side light with a crisp controlled rim and minimal motion blur.

casting_variation_guidance.body: Cast across all adult builds and statures; athletic energy comes from direction and timing, not muscularity or thinness.
casting_variation_guidance.skin: Any skin tone with equal highlight detail and no desaturation of deeper tones.
casting_variation_guidance.presentation: All presentation options are valid; avoid gender-coded sport roles.
casting_variation_guidance.age: Adults 25+ including older adults; movement should remain believable and non-patronizing.
casting_variation_guidance.pose_access: Standing, seated, prosthesis-visible, and mobility-aid-aware motion studies are equally valid.

presets.prompt_fragment: Present the unchanged supplied garment on one original fictional adult model age 25+ in a restrained movement study. Use a balanced mid-step or equivalent dynamic seated pose, abstract matte floor lines, broad white side light, a controlled rim, minimal blur, accurate garment details, and a distinct non-famous face. Convey athletic energy through composition rather than a prescribed body ideal.
avoid_list: sports brands, team colors, uniforms, numbers, medals, or stadiums
superhero poses, sci-fi armor, or glowing body effects
muscularity or thinness presented as the only athletic body
medicalized framing of mobility aids, prostheses, or limb difference
motion blur that obscures the garment
face resemblance to any real athlete, model, or celebrity

presets.one_line_mood: Walking pose, open-air market textures, late-morning sun.
presets.wardrobe_context: Eclectic but restrained lookbook; keep the supplied garment fully readable and pair it only with one or two texture-rich, unbranded basics.
presets.pose: Natural full-body pause with one low neutral tote or folded paper held away from the garment; seated option rests props outside the silhouette.
presets.setting: A fictional open-air materials stall with blank crates, fabric remnants, and no legible signs or culturally specific goods.
presets.lighting: Warm early daylight broken by soft canopy shade, with faithful color and gentle texture contrast.

casting_variation_guidance.body: Rotate through all adult builds and statures without using eclectic styling to disguise or reshape the body.
casting_variation_guidance.skin: Any skin tone; adjust warm light to preserve natural tone rather than orange-shifting the subject.
casting_variation_guidance.presentation: Feminine, masculine, androgynous, and mixed-cue styling all suit the direction.
casting_variation_guidance.age: Adults 25+ with strong representation across middle-aged and older casting.
casting_variation_guidance.pose_access: Use accessible stall spacing and adapt prop placement for standing, seated, or mobility-aid-aware poses.

presets.prompt_fragment: Present the unchanged supplied garment on one original fictional adult model age 25+ in a tactile early-morning materials-market editorial. Use a natural full-body pause, blank crates and fabric remnants, soft canopy shade, restrained warm daylight, faithful garment color, and a distinct non-famous face. Keep the place invented and culturally nonspecific.
avoid_list: ethnic-market exoticism, tourism imagery, or culturally specific costume
readable signs, currencies, flags, maps, or identifiable locations
hoarding caricature or claims about class or income
busy props that hide or visually rewrite the garment
brand marks, vintage labels, or recognizable packaging
face resemblance to any real vendor, model, or celebrity

presets.one_line_mood: Working stance, back-of-gallery setting, neutral strip light.
presets.wardrobe_context: Workwear-inflected presentation of the supplied garment, with plain unbranded trousers and protective footwear only where they leave the design unobstructed.
presets.pose: Grounded front-facing full-body stance beside an empty padded plinth, hands visible and off the garment; seated pose uses a low equipment case.
presets.setting: An invented back-of-gallery room with blank walls, moving blankets, and unlabeled hardware.
presets.lighting: Neutral track-light pool with soft ambient spill and enough fill for accurate dark-fabric detail.

casting_variation_guidance.body: All adult builds and statures fit; practical presence is conveyed by stance, not assumptions about strength or occupation.
casting_variation_guidance.skin: Any skin tone, lit with sufficient fill and no fixed association to labor or role.
casting_variation_guidance.presentation: All presentation options are valid; supporting pieces should not become a gendered uniform.
casting_variation_guidance.age: Adults 25+ across the available age bands.
casting_variation_guidance.pose_access: Standing, seated, and mobility-aid-aware versions should keep pathways clear and the framing matter-of-fact.

presets.prompt_fragment: Present the unchanged supplied garment on one original fictional adult model age 25+ in an invented after-hours gallery workroom. Use a grounded front-facing full-body stance or accessible seated equivalent, a blank padded plinth, unlabeled hardware, neutral track light, accurate dark-fabric detail, and a distinct non-famous face. Treat the job-like title as scene direction only, not a claim about occupation or class.
avoid_list: recognizable artworks, artists, galleries, museums, or exhibition identities
employee badges, uniforms, logos, hard-hat theater, or staged danger
class coding, occupational stereotyping, or claims about physical strength
art props that compete with or cover the garment
dramatic darkness that erases garment detail
face resemblance to any real artist, worker, model, or celebrity

presets.one_line_mood: Off-center stance, dark interior, warm point light.
presets.wardrobe_context: Independent nightlife editorial with the supplied garment unchanged; supporting pieces stay minimal, opaque, unbranded, and non-costume-like.
presets.pose: Full-body paused-dance gesture with a slight shoulder turn and hands clear of garment details; seated variation catches the same rhythm through posture.
presets.setting: A small invented listening room with acoustic panels, a blank speaker cabinet, and no crowd or venue identity.
presets.lighting: Low amber practical light, a muted magenta bounce, and neutral front fill to preserve color and construction.

casting_variation_guidance.body: All adult builds and statures belong in the scene; do not equate nightlife with a narrow body ideal.
casting_variation_guidance.skin: Any skin tone, with adequate neutral fill so colored light never flattens or misrepresents it.
casting_variation_guidance.presentation: Feminine, masculine, androgynous, and mixed cues all work; nightlife styling does not imply sexuality.
casting_variation_guidance.age: Adults 25+ including middle-aged and older adults; no youth-coded wristbands or school cues.
casting_variation_guidance.pose_access: Translate rhythm into standing, seated, prosthesis-visible, or mobility-aid-aware posing without spectacle.

presets.prompt_fragment: Present the unchanged supplied garment on one original fictional adult model age 25+ in a small invented analog listening-room editorial. Use a restrained paused-dance full-body gesture or dynamic seated equivalent, acoustic panels, a blank speaker cabinet, low amber light, muted magenta bounce, neutral front fill, and a distinct non-famous face. Keep the mood social and self-possessed without sexual or intoxication cues.
avoid_list: named music scenes, famous venues, performers, DJs, or album imagery
alcohol, drugs, cigarettes, intoxication, or unsafe crowd behavior
fetishwear, sexualized posing, voyeuristic angles, or consent ambiguity
neon cyberpunk treatment or colored light that hides garment color
club logos, wristbands, readable posters, or branded audio equipment
face resemblance to any real musician, model, or celebrity

presets.one_line_mood: Relaxed stance, pale exterior, flat dry daylight.
presets.wardrobe_context: Spare warm-weather lookbook centered on the supplied garment, with only neutral unbranded essentials needed for a complete, non-revealing outfit.
presets.pose: Easy full-body stance into a light breeze, arms naturally separated from the torso; seated variation uses a broad low step and preserves the full silhouette.
presets.setting: An abstract pale wall and weathered mineral ground with no coastline, landmark, or identifiable region.
presets.lighting: High soft sun through thin haze, controlled highlights, open shadows, and accurate garment color.

casting_variation_guidance.body: All adult builds and statures suit the direction; ease comes from space and gesture rather than thinness.
casting_variation_guidance.skin: Any skin tone with exposure chosen for real detail; never use tanning or lightening as a mood device.
casting_variation_guidance.presentation: All presentation options fit; grooming stays natural and individually varied rather than regionally coded.
casting_variation_guidance.age: Adults 25+ across the full age range, retaining natural skin and hair texture.
casting_variation_guidance.pose_access: Make standing, seated, and mobility-aid-aware frames equally spacious and complete.

presets.prompt_fragment: Present the unchanged supplied garment on one original fictional adult model age 25+ in a spare sun-faded outdoor editorial. Use an easy full-body stance or broad seated equivalent, an abstract pale wall, weathered mineral ground, a light breeze, high soft sun through haze, open shadows, faithful garment color, and a distinct non-famous face. Keep the location invented and the casting globally nonspecific.
avoid_list: named coastlines, deserts, resorts, countries, or travel clichés
tanning, skin lightening, sun damage, or tone used as a mood prop
poverty coding, barefoot romanticization, or drifter stereotypes
swimwear sexualization or unnecessary exposed skin
overexposure that erases garment color, texture, or construction
face resemblance to any real model, traveler, or celebrity
